basic_details.organization_name: Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology
basic_details.short_information: Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology (SCTIMST) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 3 Graduate Apprentice in Library Science Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the SCTIMST office with original documents and self-attested copies.

qualification.details: Degree from recognized University and B.Li.Sc (Eligible for training only if the date of commencement of training and the date of issue of last mark list is less than three years.)

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Written Test (if needed to shortlist)

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the SCTIMST recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology recruitment is Graduate Apprentice in Library Science.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Graduate Apprentice in Library Science post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 11th June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree from a recognized University and a B.Li.Sc.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Graduate Apprentice post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 12,300 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview, and a Written Test may be conducted if needed to shortlist candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the SCTIMST office in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.
